_comment: Per-bot config. Place at ~/.xclaw/<id>/config.json. Holds this bot's token + overrides. data/, workspace/, memory/, skills/ are derived siblings — do not set them.

sdk._comment_gateway: Model-gateway routing, mapped to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL / ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN for the claude CLI.
sdk._comment_env: Extra env vars injected into THIS bot's agent CLI. Per-bot identity vars like OCTO_BOT_ID belong here (never in the global config — that would give every bot the same id). Globally-shared vars can go in the global config's sdk.env; per-bot entries merge over them by key.
